meta.description: Public CLI Registry — Third-party and official CLIs managed by CLI-Hub across npm, bundled, brew, and other install methods

clis.name: feishu
clis.description: Official Lark (Feishu) CLI for managing Lark apps, bots, and cloud resources from the terminal

clis.name: minimax-cli
clis.description: MiniMax AI platform CLI for managing tokens, models, and API interactions from the command line

clis.name: wecom
clis.description: Official WeCom open-platform CLI for contacts, todos, meetings, messages, calendars, docs, and smart sheets
clis.requires: Node.js >= 18, WeCom account (currently limited rollout), optional Bot ID + Secret for bot flows

clis.name: contentful
clis.description: Official Contentful CLI for spaces, migrations, imports, exports, seeding, and environment management
clis.requires: Node.js LTS, Contentful account and space access

clis.name: sanity
clis.description: Official Sanity CLI for studios, datasets, schemas, imports, exports, and structured content workflows
clis.requires: Node.js and npm, Sanity account/project access

clis.name: shopify
clis.description: Official Shopify CLI for apps, themes, functions, extensions, and Hydrogen storefront workflows
clis.requires: Node.js and npm, Shopify Partner/store access

clis.name: sentry
clis.description: Official Sentry CLI for releases, sourcemaps, debug files, monitors, and org/project automation
clis.requires: Sentry account plus auth token/org/project access for most operations

clis.name: 1password-cli
clis.description: Official 1Password CLI for vault access, secrets retrieval, item automation, and desktop-app-backed authentication
clis.requires: 1Password account; desktop app integration recommended for biometric/system-auth sign-in

clis.name: generate-veo-video
clis.description: CLI for generating videos with Google Veo 3.1 via Vertex AI/Gemini — text-to-video, image-to-video, reference images, frame morphing, and video extension
clis.requires: Python >= 3.10, uv, GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT env var (GEMINI_API_KEY optional)

clis.name: jimeng
clis.description: Official ByteDance AI image and video generation CLI — text-to-image, text-to-video, image-to-video, digital human, and intelligent canvas; domestic brand is Jimeng (即梦), international brand is Dreamina
clis.requires: Jimeng / Dreamina account and API key

clis.name: obsidian-cli
clis.description: Official Obsidian command line interface for vault automation, developer tools, screenshots, search, history, and plugin workflows
clis.requires: Obsidian 1.12.7+ installer, Obsidian desktop app running, and Command line interface enabled in Settings → General
clis.install_notes: Bundled within the Obsidian 1.12+ installer. Enable Command line interface in Obsidian settings and follow the registration prompt so `obsidian` is added to PATH.
clis.uninstall_notes: Disable Command line interface from Obsidian settings or remove/update the Obsidian installer to stop using the bundled CLI.
clis.update_notes: Update the Obsidian installer to a newer 1.12+ release to update the bundled CLI.
